title: OJCP begin_application Response
description: Response schema for the begin_application tool.

application_id.description: Unique identifier for this application session. Use with check_application_status.

status.description: Current status of the application session.

product_name.description: Vendor product name for this apply path (e.g., 'Adaptive Apply', 'Indeed Apply').

url.description: URL for the application entry point.

required_fields.description: Fields required to complete the application.

optional_fields.description: Optional fields that can strengthen the application.

supports_agent_submission.description: Whether this path supports autonomous agent submission.

requires_verification.description: Whether identity verification is required before submission via this path.

accepted_verifiers.description: Identity verifier identifiers accepted for this apply path.

apply_path.description: The apply path descriptor for this application.

session_token.description: Opaque token for multi-step apply flows. Include in subsequent requests.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this application session expires.

question_text.description: The question to present to the candidate.

options.description: Available options for single_select or multi_select questions.

required.description: Whether this question must be answered.

min_length.description: Minimum character length for text answers.

max_length.description: Maximum character length for text answers.

pattern.description: Regular expression the answer must match (e.g., '\d{5}' for ZIP codes).

min.description: Minimum value for number or date answers.

max.description: Maximum value for number or date answers.

screening_questions.description: Screening questions the candidate must answer as part of the application. The agent should collect answers and include them in submit_application's application_data.

verification_steps.description: Identity verification steps required before the application can proceed. Present only when status is 'pending_verification'.

fields.description: Field names that triggered the warning.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings about the request. Providers SHOULD include a warning when fields are silently ignored due to consent_scope restrictions.
